prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS3 6.2L V8 (GM Gen IV, 430 HP stock)** with a **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission**, utilizing a **Holley Dominator EFI system** for standalone management and a **FAST LSXR 102mm intake manifold** for optimized airflow. The engine will be stroked to **416ci** via a **Callies Compstar crankshaft (4.000" stroke)** and **Mahle forged pistons (11.5:1 compression)** for high-RPM durability.

Forced induction via a **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger** (62mm, 66mm inducer) on a **custom stainless steel header setup** with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve**. The intercooler system will use a **PWR 4.5" core front-mount intercooler** with **Vibrant Performance silicone couplers** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** for rapid spool and minimal lag.

Suspension overhaul with **QA1 REV Series coilovers (2.5" diameter, 14-position rebound, 22-position compression)** paired with **Hotchkis Sport 1.25" front sway bar** and **Addco 1.125" rear sway bar**. The rear leaf springs will be replaced with **Deaver 4-leaf progressive-rate springs** and **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings** for improved articulation and weight transfer.
estetica: Widebody conversion using **Street Scene Equipment (SSE) bolt-on fender flares** (3.5" front, 4.5" rear) with **custom carbon fiber side skirts** from **AeroCatch** for a seamless OEM+ look. The front bumper will be replaced with a **Duraflex S10 Xtreme-specific lip spoiler** and **custom aluminum mesh grille** by **Billet Specialties**.

Rear wing upgrade to a **9 Lives Racing Adjustable GT Wing (Type 2, 65" width, 12" chord)** mounted on **custom aluminum pedestals** for optimal downforce. The bed will be fitted with a **BedRug Full Bedliner** in **carbon fiber weave** and a **custom aluminum tonneau cover** with **LED under-bed lighting** from **Oracle Lighting**.

Wheel setup: **Forgeline GA3R 18x9 +12 front / 18x10.5 +25 rear** with **Nitto NT05R 255/40/18 front / 295/35/18 rear tires**. The brake system will feature **Wilwood Dynalite 6-piston front calipers** with **13.1" two-piece rotors** and **Wilwood Superlite 4-piston rear calipers** with **12.2" rotors**, paired with **Hawk DTC-60 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines**.
